feed.title: Aroostook County Probate Court
feed.subtitle: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Page lists a 'Probate Court Calendar' PDF per year — a new year's calendar being added is a useful change signal. KNOWN ISSUE: aroostook.me.us has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted. [STALE: source last verified 2026-07-05T10:23:42.298863+00:00; 62 consecutive fetch failures since — items below may be out of date.]

entry.title: Monitoring started: Aroostook County Probate Court
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
